originalTitle: Forget AI Stocks: This Defense Giant Has Raised Its Dividend Each of the Last 10 Years and Currently Pays a 2.75% Yield
summary: Lockheed Martin is a durable dividend growth stock that may be just what the doctor ordered for tech-heavy portfolios.
content: Lockheed Martin is a durable dividend growth stock that may be just what the doctor ordered for tech-heavy portfolios.
chineseTitle: 忘掉 AI 股票吧：这家国防巨头在过去 10 年里每年都提高股息，目前的收益率为 2.75%
chineseSummary: 洛克希德·马丁公司是一只持久的股息增长股票，这可能正是医生为科技股密集型投资组合所开的处方。
chineseContent: 洛克希德·马丁公司是一只持久的股息增长股票，这可能正是医生为科技股密集型投资组合所开的处方。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
